# Textarea

A multi-line text input component with built-in support for labels, helper text, error messages, and animated focus/hover states. Wraps the Chakra UI Textarea with an optional Field wrapper.

## Import

```jsx
import { Textarea } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the textarea |
| `variant` | `"outline" \| "subtle" \| "flushed"` | `"outline"` | The visual variant of the textarea |
| `placeholder` | `string` | - | Placeholder text displayed when the textarea is empty |
| `resize` | `"none" \| "both" \| "horizontal" \| "vertical"` | - | Controls whether and how the textarea can be resized |
| `rows` | `number` | - | The number of visible text rows |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the textarea is disabled |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the textarea is read-only |
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the textarea is in an invalid state |
| `required` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the textarea is required |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed above the textarea |
| `helperText` | `string` | - | Helper text displayed below the textarea (hidden when invalid) |
| `errorText` | `string` | - | Error text displayed below the textarea (shown when invalid) |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to apply hover, focus, and error animations |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette used for focus and hover animations |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying textarea element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Textarea placeholder="Enter your message" />
```

### With label and helper text

```jsx
<Textarea
  label="Description"
  helperText="Maximum 500 characters"
  placeholder="Describe your project..."
/>
```

### With validation

```jsx
<Textarea
  label="Bio"
  invalid={true}
  errorText="Bio is required"
  placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
/>
```

### Controlling resize

```jsx
<Textarea resize="vertical" placeholder="Vertical resize only" />
<Textarea resize="none" placeholder="No resize" />
```

### With specific rows

```jsx
<Textarea rows={6} placeholder="Tall textarea" />
```

### Disabled and read-only

```jsx
<Textarea disabled placeholder="Disabled" />
<Textarea readOnly value="Read-only content" />
```

## Features

- Renders a standard multi-line textarea with Chakra UI styling
- Automatically wraps in a Field when `label`, `helperText`, or `errorText` is provided
- Animated hover, focus, and invalid states with configurable `colorPalette`
- Shake animation on invalid state for visual feedback
- Supports resize control and row configuration
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
